arts.ttl: Champions League | Liverpool v Bologna: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Liverpool and Bologna are set to face off in their second UEFA Champions League group stage match this evening at Anfield. This is Bologna’s first away match in the competition after drawing 0-0 against Shakhtar Donetsk in their opening game. For Liverpool, it’s their second straight match against Italian opposition, having defeated AC Milan 3-1 at San Siro in the previous round. Liverpool are keeping a close eye on Andy Robertson’s fitness after he limped off during the match against Wolves. Meanwhile, Harvey Elliott remains out of action due to a foot fracture. arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool host Bologna in the Champions League on Wednesday night as the Reds look to continue a strong start under Arne Slot. The Merseysiders are aiming for a fifth consecutive win in all competitions and to build on an impressive 3-1 win at AC Milan in their Champions League opener.
